title: ActionRequestedPayload
description: A command, not a fact — asks minecraft-service to act and may be rejected or fail. Exactly one executor (minecraft-service.command-executor); event-service archives commands for causation chains. The LLM's deliberation output is validated against the per-action params shapes in $defs before a command is ever published (CIV-7). Producer: agent-service on commands.minecraft.

commandId.description: Equal to the command's envelope eventId; carried into ActionCompleted/ActionFailed.

action.description: spawn/despawn manage the bot session itself; the rest act in-world.

params.description: Action-specific parameters; canonical shapes in $defs (spawn: SpawnParams, move: MoveParams, chat: ChatParams, follow: FollowParams; despawn/gather/idle take {}).

timeoutMs.description: The executor's watchdog emits ActionFailed{TIMEOUT} if the command hasn't terminated by then.
